hook_exists.detail: window._audioManager is set in AudioManager constructor; confirmed present in headless Chromium after 3s wait

bgm_keys.detail: _bgmBuffer exists as empty object (no BGM loaded yet — correct, loadBGM() is async and requires AudioContext)

bugs_found.description: Missing named exports ROWS and COLS. GameScene.js imports { TileGrid, ROWS, COLS } but TileGrid.js only exported the class.
bugs_found.fix_applied: Added 'export const ROWS = 6; export const COLS = 6;' to TileGrid.js
bugs_found.impact: Module link error prevented game from loading at all in headless browser, blocking audio QA
